verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: By those [winds] sent forth in gusts
verse.verse_2: And the winds that blow violently
verse.verse_5: And those [angels] who deliver a message
verse.verse_7: Indeed, what you are promised is to occur.
verse.verse_8: So when the stars are obliterated
verse.verse_9: And when the heaven is opened
verse.verse_10: And when the mountains are blown away
verse.verse_11: And when the messengers' time has come...
verse.verse_12: For what Day was it postponed?
verse.verse_14: And what can make you know what is the Day of Judgement?
verse.verse_15: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
verse.verse_16: Did We not destroy the former peoples?
verse.verse_17: Then We will follow them with the later ones.
verse.verse_18: Thus do We deal with the criminals.
verse.verse_19: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
verse.verse_20: Did We not create you from a liquid disdained?
verse.verse_21: And We placed it in a firm lodging
verse.verse_23: And We determined [it], and excellent [are We] to determine.
verse.verse_24: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
verse.verse_25: Have We not made the earth a container
verse.verse_26: Of the living and the dead?
verse.verse_27: And We placed therein lofty, firmly set mountains and have given you to drink sweet water.
verse.verse_28: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
verse.verse_29: [They will be told], "Proceed to that which you used to deny.
verse.verse_30: Proceed to a shadow [of smoke] having three columns
verse.verse_31: [But having] no cool shade and availing not against the flame."
verse.verse_32: Indeed, it throws sparks [as huge] as a fortress,
verse.verse_33: As if they were yellowish [black] camels.
verse.verse_34: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
verse.verse_35: This is a Day they will not speak,
verse.verse_36: Nor will it be permitted for them to make an excuse.
verse.verse_37: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
verse.verse_38: This is the Day of Judgement; We will have assembled you and the former peoples.
verse.verse_39: So if you have a plan, then plan against Me.
verse.verse_40: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
verse.verse_41: Indeed, the righteous will be among shades and springs
verse.verse_42: And fruits from whatever they desire,
verse.verse_43: [Being told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you used to do."
verse.verse_44: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
verse.verse_45: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
verse.verse_46: [O disbelievers], eat and enjoy yourselves a little; indeed, you are criminals.
verse.verse_47: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
verse.verse_48: And when it is said to them, "Bow [in prayer]," they do not bow.
verse.verse_49: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
verse.verse_50: Then in what statement after the Qur'an will they believe?
